zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Phillip de Néville於大約1210年出生在英國林可爾史爾斯可頓時，他的父親Ralph de Néville32歲，母親Alice Albini14歲。他於大約1232年與Sibylla de Holdenbey在英國林可爾史爾斯可頓結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1275年4月9日在英國林可爾史爾布藍普頓享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Phillip de Néville于大约1210年出生在英国林可爾史爾斯可頓时，他的父亲Ralph de Néville32岁，母亲Alice Albini14岁。他于大约1232年与Sibylla de Holdenbey在英国林可爾史爾斯可頓结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1275年4月9日在英国林可爾史爾布藍普頓享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Néville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Neuville in Calvados or Néville in Seine-Maritime, both so called from Old French neu(f) ‘new’ (from Latin novus) + ville ‘settlement’. One family line, originally from Neuville (Calvados), became powerful during the Wars of the Roses through Richard Neville (1428–71), 16th Earl of Warwick, nicknamed "The Kingmaker".
Irish (Munster): assimilation of the Gaelic name Ó Niadh (see Nee ) and sometimes of Ó Cnaimhín (see Nevin ).

History: George Neville came to VA in or c. 1700 and settled on the headwaters of the Occoquan River, acquiring a large estate. His descendants, bearing the surnames Neville and Craig, were of considerable importance in Pittsburgh, PA, and Cincinnati, OH.

variants.name: Nevells
meanings: Irish: variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevils
meanings: English: variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Novel
meanings: English: variant of   Neville  .
Catalan: variant of   Novell  .

variants.name: Newell
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .
English: variant of   Noel  .
English: variant of   Newhall  .

variants.name: Nevills
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Nevil
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Newill
meanings: English and Irish (or Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevill
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevels
meanings: English and Scottish (Wigtownshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.
Dutch and North German: unexplained.

variants.name: Nee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, John Patrick.

Irish (Galway): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Niadh ‘descendant of Nia’ or Mac Niadh ‘son of Nia’. Compare McNee . Needham 2 and Neville have also been adopted as Anglicized forms of this name.
North German: possibly a relationship name from Middle Low German neve ‘nephew, grand-child’.

nameMeanings.name: Phillip
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of Philip , in part a reflection of the surname, which is usually spelled Phillips.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Phillip de Néville was born about 1210, in Scotton, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Ralph de Néville, was 32 and his mother, Alice Albini, was 14. He married Sibylla de Holdenbey about 1232, in Scotton, Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 9 April 1275, in Brampton, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Phillip de Néville est né environ 1210, à Scotton, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Ralph de Néville, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Alice Albini, avait 14 ans. Il a épousé Sibylla de Holdenbey environ 1232, à Scotton, Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 9 avril 1275, à Brampton, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 66 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Phillip de Néville(이)가 대략 1210년 영국 링코실르 스콧에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph de Néville(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Albini(은)는 14세였다. 그는 대략 1232년 영국 링코실르 스콧에서 Sibylla de Holdenbey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1275년 4월 9일 영국 링코실르 브램프턴에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Phillip de Néville родился около 1210 г. в местности скоттон, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Ralph de Néville было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Albini, 14. Он женился на женщине по имени Sibylla de Holdenbey около 1232 г. в местности скоттон, линколншир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 9 апреля 1275 г. в местности брамптон, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 66 лет.
